<!-- One paragraph on how you'd like it to work. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits within the current 11-strategy / Gate.io+OKX surface
- [ ] This requires a new external integration (please name it):
- [ ] This requires a new MCP server / tool
- [ ] This changes the agent runtime (Agno Agent / Team / Workflow)
